last_episode_to_air.name: The End of Summer
last_episode_to_air.overview: The end of summer has arrived, with Chibita deciding to close up his oden stall and pursue a charitable cause. Osomatsu, frustrated with this sudden change, angrily pressures his childhood buddy to stay.

name: Mr. Osomatsu
overview: Sequel/spin-off of the gag manga classic Osomatsu-kun, entailing the lives of the now 20-something NEET virgin Matsuno sextuplets and the bizarre adventures they find themselves into in the modern day.

seasons.name: 1st season
seasons.overview: The Matsuno brothers, stars of "Osomatsu-kun", are jaded 20-somethings looking for a job and love, but never seem to find it or make an effort to. How can they compete with everyone else in the country? Featured alongside these tales of adult woe are stories of imagination, from a murder mystery to the Sengoku era.

seasons.name: 2nd season
seasons.overview: The sextuplets, after their successful first season, are back to the grindstone of perhaps finding societal balance...or maybe just slacking off and enjoying life through their empty wallets. Humorous topics such as self-doubt, mortality, and the ever-present inferiority complex are abound!

seasons.name: 3rd season
seasons.overview: After their deaths last season, the sextuplets are visited by two AI-powered robots who claim to be in service to NEETs who need them. Do they have ulterior motives? What's Totoko's long-time idol rival doing as a single mother? And what does an AI comedy competition have in store for the brothers and their new helpers?

seasons.name: 4th Season
seasons.overview: Join the Matsuno sextuplets and all the rest as they celebrate what will hopefully be a relaxing summer, if not for the fact that they're still broke and not even trying for employment.
